CustomField.formula: IF( IF(leaseworks__Stepped_Rent__r.leaseworks__Last_RentSlip_With_Invoice__c!=null, OR(leaseworks__For_Month_Ending__c <leaseworks__Stepped_Rent__r.leaseworks__Last_RentSlip_With_Invoice__r.leaseworks__For_Month_Ending__c, AND(leaseworks__For_Month_Ending__c == leaseworks__Stepped_Rent__r.leaseworks__Last_RentSlip_With_Invoice__r.leaseworks__For_Month_Ending__c, leaseworks__Stepped_Rent__r.leaseworks__Last_RentSlip_With_Invoice__c == Id )),false) , if(AND( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Stepped_Rent__r.leaseworks__Last_RentSlip_With_Invoice__r.leaseworks__Y_Hidden_Utilization__r.leaseworks__Type__c ,'True Up Gross'), leaseworks__PBH_Eff_Prev__c== null), IF(leaseworks__PBH_Minimum__c> leaseworks__PBH_Amount__c , leaseworks__PBH_Minimum__c, if(leaseworks__PBH_Maximum__c < leaseworks__PBH_Amount__c ,leaseworks__PBH_Maximum__c, leaseworks__PBH_Amount__c )),leaseworks__PBH_Eff_Prev__c) , IF(leaseworks__PBH_Minimum__c> leaseworks__PBH_Amount__c , leaseworks__PBH_Minimum__c, if(leaseworks__PBH_Maximum__c < leaseworks__PBH_Amount__c ,leaseworks__PBH_Maximum__c, leaseworks__PBH_Amount__c )))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Sum of all assemblies PBH amounts for utilization period after Minimum/Maximum adjustment
CustomField.label: PBH Effective
